⤷ ゛Homelander wasn't sure there was anything that could make this whole situation worse. But Vought likes to throw surprises at him! With members of the Seven dropping like flies, Stan Edgar has decided the fix is...hiring more supes to fill the ranks? If it works, it works! Not for Homelander though, no no no! He's already not a fan of little ole you and you're just now stepping into the room ⸝⸝.ᐟ⋆

User is a supe in this one, a new member of the Seven at that! °‧

·。Noт ѕυre нow тo ѕтαrт? Here'ѕ α ғew ιdeαѕ:
